name: axel-memory-manager
description: Axel — portable agent intelligence (search, memory, self-organizing knowledge) backed by VolciRAG, Memkoshi, and Consolidation. One .r8 file is the agent's entire brain.

commands.name: axel
commands.description: Manage Axel memory brain and GLiNER models.

fields.label: Min consolidation length
fields.help: Messages shorter than this byte length are skipped during consolidation.

fields.label: GLiNER metadata enrichment
fields.help: When on, runs a small CPU model to extract tags, topics, and category from each chat turn. ~165 MB model downloaded on first use; ~50 ms per turn.

fields.label: GLiNER model variant
fields.help: Model size. Small is 165 MB / ~300 MB RAM / ~50 ms; medium is 440 MB / ~600 MB / ~120 ms. Restart required after change.

fields.label: When to enrich memories
fields.help: off: never enrich. on_complete: per chat turn (live tags). on_session_end: batch at end (cheaper). First chat turn after enabling will block ~10–30 s while the model downloads.
